title: The impact of the new media
summary: 9699 — social media, activism, surveillance, and cultural change from digital platforms.
learningObjectives: Explain how social media changes communication.
Analyse online activism and citizen journalism.
Evaluate echo chambers, fake news, and regulation.
Assess impacts on privacy and surveillance.

simpleExplanation.title: Platforms that changed everything
simpleExplanation.summary: New media enable rapid mobilisation and global connection, but also misinformation, surveillance capitalism, and fragmented public spheres.

sections.content: **New media impact** (9.3) completes Topic 9. Balance **optimistic** and **critical** digital sociology.
